title: App() state 重构 + 场景选择 UI + 7 守卫点适配
objective: src/main.tsx:764 `const scenario = unclearRequirementsScenario` 删除,改为 `selectedScenarioId: string|null` state + `scenario = useMemo(() => scenarioRegistry.find(s => s.id === selectedScenarioId) ?? null, [selectedScenarioId])` + 派生 `hasSelectedScenario = scenario !== null`。7 守卫点(:808/:930/:948/:1101/:1154/:1155/:1276)适配。src/main.tsx:1205-1209 guidance-overlay 替换为场景选择器(3 卡片 A/D/F),选中后 setSelectedScenarioId + setActiveStepId(steps[0].id) + setSelectedNodeId(null) + setPopover(null) + setSimulatedProjectState(taskType 对应),canvasTransform/isFullscreen 保留。activeStepId 初始值改 null。
rationale: 覆盖 implementation_scope 1 接入层 + REC-002 + REC-004 + REC-006。解耦 21+ scenario 变量消费点(通过 useMemo 自动重算),7 hasSelectedScenario 守卫点逐一适配为派生值。空态从'点击中央节点'改为'3 卡片场景选择器',符合路径 2 统一 selector(绕开 nodes[0] 约定,C-003)。
acceptance_criteria: src/main.tsx 不含 'const scenario = unclearRequirementsScenario' 硬编码

criteria: npm run test:e2e exits 0 and verifies scenario selector renders 3 options (A/D/F), selecting a scenario loads corresponding canvas, canvasTransform preserved on switch [UI-observable]

action.state_refactor: src/main.tsx:764 删除 `const scenario = unclearRequirementsScenario`;src/main.tsx:770 删除 `const [hasSelectedScenario, setHasSelectedScenario] = useState(false)`,改为 `const [selectedScenarioId, setSelectedScenarioId] = useState<string | null>(null);`;新增 `const scenario = useMemo(() => scenarioRegistry.find((s) => s.id === selectedScenarioId) ?? null, [selectedScenarioId]);`;新增 `const hasSelectedScenario = scenario !== null;`(派生,非 state)
action.simulatedState_intro: src/main.tsx App() 内新增 `const [simulatedProjectState, setSimulatedProjectState] = useState<SimulatedProjectState>({ milestone: 'M2', phase: 0, hasBlueprint: false, hasAnalyze: false, hasPlan: false, hasExecute: false, intentClarity: 'unclear', taskType: 'new' });`(为 TASK-003 recommendCommands 接入预留,TASK-002 仅用于 selectScenario 中 taskType 设置)
action.activeStepId: src/main.tsx:765 `useState(scenario.steps[0].id)` 改为 `useState<string | null>(null)`;场景选择后 setActiveStepId(scenario.steps[0].id)
action.guard_808: src/main.tsx:806-812 revealedNodeIds useMemo: `if (!scenario) return new Set<string>(); const intentNodeId = scenario.nodes[0].id; if (!hasSelectedScenario) return new Set<string>([intentNodeId]);`
action.guard_930: src/main.tsx:930 `if (!hasSelectedScenario || !activeNode) return;` 保留(hasSelectedScenario 派生)
action.guard_948: src/main.tsx:946-953 activateNode: 删除 `if (!hasSelectedScenario) { setHasSelectedScenario(true); }` 整块(场景选择改由 selectScenario handler 触发,不再通过节点点击);保留 setSelectedNodeId + setActiveStepId
action.guard_1101: src/main.tsx:1100-1101 handleSaveCurrentRoute: `if (!hasSelectedScenario || !activeStep) return;` 保留;内部 scenario.citations/scenario.title 改为 `scenario?.citations ?? []`/`scenario?.title ?? 'unknown'`
action.guard_1155: src/main.tsx:1155 `const scenarioLabelText = hasSelectedScenario ? scenario.title : '未选择场景';` 改为 `const scenarioLabelText = scenario?.title ?? '未选择场景';`
action.guard_1276: src/main.tsx:1275-1277 分支渲染: `{activeNode && hasSelectedScenario && activeBranches.map(...)}` 保留(hasSelectedScenario 派生)
action.useMemo_null_guards: src/main.tsx:788-822 activeStep/selectedNode/activeNodeIds/nodeLayout useMemo 全部加 scenario null 守卫: activeStep 返回 null,selectedNode 返回 null,activeNodeIds 返回 new Set<string>(),nodeLayout 返回 new Map()
action.selector_ui:
src/main.tsx:1205-1209 guidance-overlay div 替换为场景选择器: `{guidanceVisible && (

选择场景开始 — 点击下方卡片进入对应工作流

{scenarioRegistry.map((s) => ())}
)}`
action.selectScenario_handler: 新增 `const selectScenario = (id: string) => { const target = scenarioRegistry.find((s) => s.id === id); if (!target) return; setSelectedScenarioId(id); setActiveStepId(target.steps[0].id); setSelectedNodeId(null); setPopover(null); setSimulatedProjectState({ milestone: 'M2', phase: 0, hasBlueprint: false, hasAnalyze: false, hasPlan: false, hasExecute: false, intentClarity: 'unclear', taskType: id === 'A_full_project' ? 'new' : id === 'D_small_fix' ? 'bugfix' : 'explore' }); };`
action.css: src/styles.css 新增 `.scenario-selector`(绝对定位居中,grid 布局,透明背景),`.scenario-cards`(3 列 grid),`.scenario-card`(透明背景,边框 rgba(255,255,255,0.15),hover 高亮),`.scenario-card-id`/`.scenario-card-title`/`.scenario-card-summary` 样式;保留 `.guidance-overlay` 样式兼容
action.e2e: scripts/e2e-smoke.mjs:36-44 更新: 初始态断言 `scenario-selector` testid 存在且含 3 个 scenario-card 按钮;点击 scenario-card-A_full_project 后断言 canvas-transform-group 渲染;新增切换 scenario-card-D_small_fix 后断言节点 aria-label 含'规划'/'评审',canvasTransform.data-transform-x/y/scale 与切换前一致

implementation.action: 删除 `const scenario = unclearRequirementsScenario`(line 764);删除 `const [hasSelectedScenario, setHasSelectedScenario] = useState(false)`(line 770);新增 `const [selectedScenarioId, setSelectedScenarioId] = useState<string | null>(null);`;新增 `const scenario = useMemo(() => scenarioRegistry.find((s) => s.id === selectedScenarioId) ?? null, [selectedScenarioId]);`;新增 `const hasSelectedScenario = scenario !== null;`(派生)
`const [activeStepId, setActiveStepId] = useState(scenario.steps[0].id);` 改为 `const [activeStepId, setActiveStepId] = useState<string | null>(null);`

implementation.target: src/main.tsx:775 附近(savedRoutes state 之后)
implementation.action: 新增 `const [simulatedProjectState, setSimulatedProjectState] = useState<SimulatedProjectState>({ milestone: 'M2', phase: 0, hasBlueprint: false, hasAnalyze: false, hasPlan: false, hasExecute: false, intentClarity: 'unclear', taskType: 'new' });`

activeStep 改为 `const activeStep = useMemo(() => scenario ? (scenario.steps.find((s) => s.id === activeStepId) ?? scenario.steps[0]) : null, [activeStepId, scenario]);`;selectedNode 改为 `const selectedNode = useMemo(() => scenario ? (scenario.nodes.find((n) => n.id === selectedNodeId) ?? null) : null, [selectedNodeId, scenario]);`;activeNodeIds 改为 `const activeNodeIds = useMemo(() => { if (!scenario || !activeStep) return new Set<string>(); return new Set(scenario.steps.slice(0, scenario.steps.findIndex((s) => s.id === activeStep.id) + 1).map((s) => s.nodeId)); }, [activeStep, scenario]);`

改为 `const revealedNodeIds = useMemo(() => { if (!scenario) return new Set<string>(); const intentNodeId = scenario.nodes[0].id; if (!hasSelectedScenario) return new Set<string>([intentNodeId]); return new Set<string>([intentNodeId, ...Array.from(activeNodeIds)]); }, [hasSelectedScenario, activeNodeIds, scenario]);`

改为 `const nodeLayout = useMemo(() => { const map = new Map<string, { x: number; y: number }>(); if (scenario) { scenario.nodes.forEach((node, index) => { map.set(node.id, { x: BASE_X + index * MAIN_LINE_GAP, y: MAIN_LINE_Y }); }); } return map; }, [scenario]);`
activeBranches 头部加 `if (!scenario || !activeStep) return [];`(scenario.continuationRoutes 已 null 安全);visibleNodes 头部 `if (!scenario) return [];`
guard_930 `if (!hasSelectedScenario || !activeNode) return;` 保留(hasSelectedScenario 派生)

删除 `if (!hasSelectedScenario) { setHasSelectedScenario(true); }` 整块;改为 `const activateNode = (nodeId: string) => { setSelectedNodeId(nodeId); if (!scenario) return; const nodeStep = scenario.steps.find((step) => step.nodeId === nodeId); if (nodeStep) setActiveStepId(nodeStep.id); };`

guard_1101 保留 `if (!hasSelectedScenario || !activeStep) return;`;`scenario.citations` 改为 `scenario?.citations ?? []`;`scenario.title` 改为 `scenario?.title ?? 'unknown'`;`scenario.id` 改为 `scenario?.id ?? 'unknown'`

activeNode 改为 `const activeNode = useMemo(() => scenario ? (scenario.nodes.find((n) => n.id === activeStep?.nodeId) ?? null) : null, [scenario, activeStep]);`;popoverStep/popoverNode/popoverCitations 全部 `scenario ?` 守卫;guard_1154 `const guidanceVisible = !hasSelectedScenario;` 保留;guard_1155 `const scenarioLabelText = scenario?.title ?? '未选择场景';`

implementation.target: src/main.tsx(App 内新增 selectScenario handler,置于 handleSaveCurrentRoute 之前)
implementation.action: 新增 `const selectScenario = (id: string) => { const target = scenarioRegistry.find((s) => s.id === id); if (!target) return; setSelectedScenarioId(id); setActiveStepId(target.steps[0].id); setSelectedNodeId(null); setPopover(null); setSimulatedProjectState({ milestone: 'M2', phase: 0, hasBlueprint: false, hasAnalyze: false, hasPlan: false, hasExecute: false, intentClarity: 'unclear', taskType: id === 'A_full_project' ? 'new' : id === 'D_small_fix' ? 'bugfix' : 'explore' }); };`
替换为场景选择器 JSX 见 action.selector_ui;guidanceVisible 控制渲染,scenarioRegistry.map 渲染 3 卡片,data-testid=`scenario-card-${s.id}`

新增 `.scenario-selector { position: absolute; top: 50%; left: 50%; transform: translate(-50%, -50%); display: grid; gap: 16px; z-index: 5; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.04); padding: 24px; border-radius: 12px; }` `.guidance-copy { margin: 0 0 8px; font-size: 14px; opacity: 0.8; }` `.scenario-cards { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); gap: 16px; }` `.scenario-card { background: transparent; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.15); padding: 20px; cursor: pointer; border-radius: 8px; text-align: left; color: inherit; font: inherit; }` `.scenario-card:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.08); border-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.3); }` `.scenario-card-id { display: block; font-size: 11px; opacity: 0.6; margin-bottom: 4px; }` `.scenario-card-title { display: block; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 600; }` `.scenario-card-summary { display: block; font-size: 12px; opacity: 0.7; margin-top: 8px; line-height: 1.4; }`

更新断言: `expect(screen.getByTestId('scenario-selector')).toBeInTheDocument()`;删除 `expect(screen.getByTestId('guidance-overlay')).toBeInTheDocument()`(改为断言 scenario-selector);删除 `expect(screen.getByText('unclear-requirements')).toBeInTheDocument()` 或改为 `expect(screen.getByText('A_full_project')).toBeInTheDocument()`;删除 `查看 模糊目标` 节点断言(空态不再渲染 intent 节点);新增断言 3 个 scenario-card 按钮 `screen.getByTestId('scenario-card-A_full_project')` 等;保留 [UI-observable] 标记

从 `await user.click(screen.getByRole('button', { name: '查看 模糊目标' }))` 改为 `await user.click(screen.getByTestId('scenario-card-A_full_project'))`;断言 `screen.queryByTestId('scenario-selector')` 不存在;断言 canvas 节点渲染 `查看 模糊目标`(A_full_project intent 节点)

更新: 初始态断言 `await page.getByTestId('scenario-selector').waitFor()`;断言 3 个 scenario-card 按钮 `await page.getByTestId('scenario-card-A_full_project').waitFor()`;删除 `查看 模糊目标` 节点初始态断言(空态不渲染节点);新增: `await page.getByTestId('scenario-card-A_full_project').click()` 后断言 `canvas-transform-group` 渲染;新增切换测试: 读取切换前 `data-transform-x/y/scale`,点击 `scenario-card-D_small_fix`,断言节点 aria-label 含'规划'/'评审',断言切换后 `data-transform-x/y/scale` 与切换前一致
